commit.subject: LU-16796 ptlrpc: Change struct ptlrpc_svc_ctx to use kref
commit.message:
LU-16796 ptlrpc: Change struct ptlrpc_svc_ctx to use kref

This patch changes struct ptlrpc_svc_ctx to use
kref(refcount_t) instead of atomic_t. This patch
also drops refcounting from sec_null and sec_plain.

Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: Ib9d5b3aec3bd34b1c20aca86a53d823e630cb77e
